summary: Implementation matches the spec: new compact dashboard template, helpers in `github-messages.mjs`, and updated tests; CI unit suite passed.

requirement_checks.requirement: Factory PR descriptions render a `Factory Dashboard` section without using a table.
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/pr-body.md: contains '## Factory Dashboard' and tokens for sections.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: includes assertions that the produced body contains '## Factory Dashboard'.
CI workflow run 23378361353: unit tests succeeded (unit: success).

requirement_checks.requirement: Top dashboard summary is rendered as compact grouped lines instead of a table and uses the prescribed segments (state, optional stage, waiting descriptor).
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: `formatDashboardSummary` and `buildDashboardSection` implement grouped summary and lines.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts specific summary line outputs for plan_ready, blocked, and implementing states.

requirement_checks.requirement: Suggested next actions list uses slash-command suggestions drawn from control panel mutation actions.
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: `buildSuggestedActionsSection` maps control panel actions to slash-command lines.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts the suggested actions list contains `/factory implement`, `/factory pause`, `/factory resume`, etc., per state.

requirement_checks.requirement: Update the PR body template and `renderPrBody` to compute the new dashboard summary, suggested actions, artifact grouping, and operator notes.
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/pr-body.md: new template ordering with DASHBOARD_SECTION, SUGGESTED_ACTIONS_SECTION, ARTIFACTS_SECTION, OPERATOR_NOTES_SECTION, and 'Closes #{{ISSUE_NUMBER}}'.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: renderPrBody composes the new sections and appends serialized factory-state comment.

requirement_checks.requirement: Artifacts section groups Plan, Run, and Review lines and omits groups when no links are present.
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts presence and formatting of '**Plan**', '**Run**', and '**Review**' lines in rendered output.

requirement_checks.requirement: Unit tests updated to cover the acceptance scenarios and metadata serialization remains parseable.
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs and tests/pr-metadata.test.mjs: updated assertions covering summary lines, suggested actions, artifact lines, operator notes, and 'Closes #<issue>' placement.
CI workflow run 23378361353: unit tests succeeded.

findings.title: Artifact links may point to missing files
findings.details: `buildArtifactLinks` constructs canonical artifact URLs but does not verify the existence of the target files; PR bodies may therefore include links that 404 until artifacts are generated.
findings.recommendation: Either check artifact file existence before rendering artifact link groups, or document that generated links are conservative placeholders. Consider adding a unit test for omission behavior when artifacts are absent.
